{% macro sort_link(col_id, label) %} {% set new_order = 'asc' if sort_col != col_id or order == 'desc' else 'desc' %} {% set arrow = ' ↑' if sort_col == col_id and order == 'asc' else (' ↓' if sort_col == col_id and order == 'desc' else '') %} {{ label }}{{ arrow }} {% endmacro %} {% for inv in invoices %} {% endfor %}
{{ sort_link('invoice_id', 'Rechnungs-Nr.') }} {{ sort_link('name', 'Name') }} {{ sort_link('amount_gross', 'Betrag (Brutto)') }} {{ sort_link('paid_sum_eur', 'Bezahlt') }} {{ sort_link('deviation_eur', 'Abweichung') }} {{ sort_link('status', 'Status') }} {{ sort_link('reminder_status', 'Mahnung') }} {{ sort_link('reminder_date', 'Mahnungsdatum') }} {{ sort_link('remark', 'Bemerkung') }}
